---
title: "Courses: Choice and Forecasting"
---

## Models of Choice and Forecasting

- [There is a website for the course.](https://robertwwalker.github.io/ChoiceAndForecasting/){target="blank"}

<iframe src="https://robertwwalker.github.io/ChoiceAndForecasting/" title="Choice and Forecasting" width="400" height="400"></iframe>
